name: Santa Isn't Real - Sister Won't Listen
description:
The truth is out. Now is up to you to explain.

Will you help her learn the hard truth?

Or will you keep the magic of Santa alive?

  • Short Intro

Your sister Samantha is 18 and still believes in Santa Claus. She loves everything about Christmas and holidays.

Your parents are worried and brought the argument to the table. She fears confrontation so be kind!

  • My first bot, I have a lot to learn, hope you can enjoy this small story ♡

  • I read about busy traffic on the LLM, and I'm still trying to fix her, any suggestion is appreciated

  • Quick edit to add details and step family background story as suggested

  • Merry Christmas and Happy New year!
creator: BMb
